focus_hypotheses: Official same-input replay must be codified so parser candidates can be judged with a reproducible hybrid protocol instead of ad hoc shell steps.

The current baseline parser itself may already drift from the stored v17 report on withholding synthetic inputs, and that drift should be measured before accepting or rejecting further parser candidates.

changes.summary: Added a reusable hybrid replay script that copies baseline actual results for untouched cases, reruns only selected case_ids or prefixes on the current code, and writes report/summary/comparison artifacts in one step.

raw_drift_examples.expected: 1 Main Street Suite 1 New York NY 10001 United States of America

official_same_input_replay_audit.reason: This replay establishes that the current environment no longer reproduces the stored v17 withholding outputs, so future parser promotions must interpret official replay regressions with an explicit OCR drift audit.

baseline_comparison.note: No OCR/parser candidate was promoted in this iteration; the retained change is replay protocol stabilization only.

date_regression.note: The replay audit regressed withholding address and name fields only; `signature_date` remained unchanged.

kept_candidates: hybrid official replay script and protocol hook
next_priorities: Design a narrower withholding address rescue that targets sparse full-text address captures like `2001 United States of America` without broad region-address preference.
Add a replay-baseline comparison step to the next parser candidate so OCR drift and parser deltas are reported separately in the same iteration.
